reviews.review_description: I i love this game i can't stop playing it is just like hellhoard but much more colorful.
Very nice

For some reasons it is even better than Hellhorde.
I love it!

It's a gauntlet style of game with no exciting gameplay  Also, i did't find the quit/leave button.
Everytime i need to turn off the power and restart  the quest3.l
Sick i love this game

reviews.review_title: Why are the awakening beasties in here
reviews.review_description: They literally copied the awakening beasties in this game is boring. It’s literally from the learning app don’t install it.
They want you to pay for coins after you play a few times. Crappy I un-installed. 💩

Crit Attack is a surprisingly engaging mixed reality experience that transforms my own room into a frantic battleground of quirky critters. At first, it seems straightforward, but after a few rounds, I realized there’s more strategy involved than I expected—and that’s part of the fun. I appreciate the variety of upgrades that keeps me experimenting and improving. getting through the early waves is easy enough, but pushing beyond them takes some careful thought. All things considered, Crit Attack manages to be both simple and surprisingly deep, and it’s well worth a spot in my VR lineup.

Crit Attack brings my place to life and turns it into a hilarious, frantic fight zone. I love how each critter type has its own personality! The upgrades keep me playing longer than I’d care to admit. Challenging, fun, and the best part - it's free!

The graphics really pop in this game. I like to play far away from the portal so that the mixed reality part is more obvious. Dozens of critters running all over my floor and managing to defeat them right before they get me is chef's kiss.

The title really says it all. It's just super well done, a great balance between powerups and the waves. And also the overall progression you can get in this is spot on, just feels very rewarding to play!

This is a fun game that is deceptively simple. It's easy to start, but not that easy to get beyond the first levels. 

It needs a little bit of strategy and tactics and once you start to understand it, it's even more fun.
Very interesting game, funny and cool gameplay.

Just tried Crit Attack and I’m seriously impressed. Mixing my own room with a full-on invasion is awesome! I keep coming back to beat my old score and combine different upgrades. The boss battles are pure chaos in the coolest way.

I haven’t played it yet but I’m already a little disappointed they went this route . They first made a game called pioneer endless journey. It was a game where if you died once you had to start all over. And each play through was randomized . The only problem was they needed to add onto it , they never gave it an update . But I’m excited to try this version , it does look neat .

This game is so good. I highly recommend it for people who love shooting games. Its graphics are simple and appropriate for younger gamers.I love how there is so much different critters to shoot and sometimes a boss monster appears ! This game is AMAZING and you should definitely download it .

The Ryans
But there's something better it's called Hell Hoard the same concept but they are monsters running towards you i love it. Y'all should try it. Bet you too will love it.

The worlds look amazing, the Critters are awesome and shooting them is so satisfying. 
Easy to start but hard to make it to the top of the leaderboard. 
And it's completely free with so many ways you can win coins just by playing. 
I highly recommend it!

I didn’t think I’d get so hooked, but Crit Attack is so addicting. It feels like my entire space is alive with these  troublemakers! I love pushing my high score onto the leaderboards. The weapon upgrades are super satisfying. Totally worth the download!”

reviews.review_title: A fun, family-friendly game for everyone
reviews.review_description:
This game is much needed for mixed reality! There are so many adult based shooting games but I couldn't find anything suitable for the younger audience, so when I came across this, I was excited to show my son! (just turned 10yrs).

There are colourful critters, scornful scorpions, running robots, venomous flying wasps and then you meet the boss that comes out to attack you! Kill those monsters, dodge their lasers and shoot them down before they shoot you! This game is exciting, the graphics AMAZING and makes you want to play on to get to the next Wave! As with other games, you get upgrades on weapons and can bank coins to remain at levels - it's fun, frantic and full of cheeky critters! We were sniping, diving to avoid being shot and rolling around to get closer to killing the boss! This game was so fun that it become 'just one more game' or 'after I've got to the next Wave'....overall, a thoroughly enjoyable game and one which will be played over and over again!
